mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product_variants WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM product_variants WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_variants (product_id, specifications, price, sale_price, stock, cpu, ram, storage, screen, deleted) VALUES (#{productId}, #{specifications}, #{price}, #{salePrice}, #{stock}, #{cpu}, #{ram}, #{storage}, #{screen}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE product_variants SET specifications = #{specifications}, price = #{price}, sale_price = #{salePrice}, stock = #{stock}, cpu = #{cpu}, ram = #{ram}, storage = #{storage}, screen = #{screen} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product_variants SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product_variants SET deleted = 1 WHERE product_id = #{productId}
